title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 03 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 03 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 03 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 03/06/2025
Today, DCE iron ore futures opened lower and closed lower, with the most-traded contract I2509 eventually closing at 695.5, down 1.14% for the day.Traders sold goods according to market conditions; steel mills adopted a wait-and-see aƫtude cautiously, with general purchase willingness. The market transaction atmosphere was sluggish. In the Shandong region, the mainstream transaction prices of PB fines were in the range of 726-730 yuan/mt, dropping slightly by 5-10 yuan/mt compared to the prices before the holiday.
